assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements.
The intragroup dividend has been declared such that a monetary receivable is recognised and gives rise to foreign exchange exposure in consolidation.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 treats a recognised asset or liability as an eligible hedged item, and IAS 21/IFRS 9 specifically acknowledge that foreign currency gains or losses on intragroup monetary items may remain in consolidated financial statements.
